LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. LAKRITZ INFORMED THE COURT THAT THEY DISMISSED DEFENDANT (BLOCKBUSTER) IN THE CASE AND PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. THOMAS S. LAKRITZ, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-6547 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION'S Motion For Order For Prejudgment Possession [Ccp 1255.410] IS GRANTED. ATTY. LAKRITZ INFORMED THE COURT THAT THEY DISMISSED DEFENDANT (BLOCKBUSTER) IN THE CASE AND PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)
